instructions.stateAccess: Use gh CLI to read/write state on autopilot-state branch
instructions.lockProtocol: Check locks/ directory via gh api before starting operations
instructions.releaseProtocol: Follow workspace.json config, use gh CLI for API operations
instructions.handoffProtocol: Read pending handoffs via gh api, update status on completion
instructions.auditProtocol: Record actions via gh api to audit directory
